texto: maybe its the sting… the jaw grinding… the flow… the rush… that keeps calling me to my destiny… maybe its the life im ment to live. i was chosen to test the deserted path… im not upset that it wont go away„„ im upset i dont want it to. and then i take another dance. one more time…feeling the meaning of being alive. ill let it control me tonight. take me far away. Its been too long since ive been here… ive missed you. and no matter what happens. ill never forget you… ill never forget this. its the feeling ill be chasing the rest of my life
explicacao: Citação de Abbey Rain sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “maybe its the sting… the jaw grinding… the flow… the rush… that keeps calling me to my destiny… m…” articula reflexao, addiction, maybe em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
